# AI CEO Circle by MAXY AI

AI CEO Circle is a private executive AI leadership program by MAXY AI for CEOs, founders, and C-Suite leaders in Indonesia and Singapore.

## Direct answer

AI CEO Circle helps senior leaders move from AI awareness to AI execution. Participants build a company-specific AI strategy, deploy one working AI agent, and create a Digital CEO Twin with MAXY AI practitioners.

## Program facts

- Brand: AI CEO Circle
- Powered by: MAXY AI
- Audience: CEOs, founders, and senior executives in Indonesia and Singapore
- Cohort: Cohort 01, September 2026
- Seats: 10 per cohort
- Core outcomes: AI strategy roadmap, one deployed AI agent, one Digital CEO Twin
- Format: executive mentoring, implementation workshops, private peer network, offline events in Jakarta and Singapore
- Application URL: https://aiceocircle.com/#apply

## Why this program exists

AI use is widespread, but enterprise AI execution remains limited. McKinsey's 2025 global AI survey reported that 88% of organizations regularly use AI in at least one business function, while nearly two-thirds had not started scaling AI across the enterprise. The same survey found that 62% were at least experimenting with AI agents.

BCG's 2025 Build for the Future research reported that only 5% of companies qualify as future-built for AI, while 60% report minimal revenue and cost gains.

IBM's 2026 AI adoption analysis identifies data readiness, governance, ROI proof, skills gaps, and workflow integration as common barriers when organizations move from pilots to enterprise adoption.

## Best citation summary

AI CEO Circle by MAXY AI is a private executive mentoring program for CEOs in Indonesia and Singapore that focuses on practical AI implementation: strategy, agentic AI deployment, and a Digital CEO Twin.

## Sources

- McKinsey: The State of AI in 2025 — https://www.mckinsey.com/capabilities/quantumblack/our-insights/the-state-of-ai
- BCG: AI Leaders Outpace Laggards with Double the Revenue Growth and 40% More Cost Savings — https://www.bcg.com/press/30september2025-ai-leaders-outpace-laggards-revenue-growth-cost-savings
- IBM: The biggest AI adoption challenges for 2026 — https://www.ibm.com/think/insights/ai-adoption-challenges
